formats.name: Multiple choice
formats.desc: Pick one or more correct options from a list (supports select-all-that-apply).

formats.name: Fill in the blank
formats.desc: Complete a statement using dropdowns or short-answer fields.

formats.name: Matching
formats.desc: Pair items from two sets (e.g. selector method to what it selects).

formats.name: Hot spot
formats.desc: Click the correct area on an image / code block.

formats.name: Build list
formats.desc: Arrange items into the correct order or sequence.

formats.name: DOMC
formats.desc: Discrete Option Multiple Choice: options appear one at a time with YES/NO; a single wrong response fails the item, forward-only.

domains.name: Developing & optimizing dbt models
subs: Commands: build, run, test, docs, show, snapshot, seed
Logical flow of models & clean DAGs
Providing access with the grants config
Running models in sample mode (--sample flag)

domains.name: Managing dbt models governance
subs: Adding contracts to ensure model shape
Creating model versions & deprecating old ones
Defining constraints in YAML for data integrity

domains.name: Debugging data modeling errors
subs: Developing, implementing & testing a fix before merge

domains.name: Troubleshooting & optimizing pipelines
subs: Troubleshooting & managing failure points in the DAG

domains.name: Implementing dbt tests
subs: Generic, singular, custom, custom generic & unit tests
Testing assumptions for models and sources
Implementing testing steps in the workflow
